title: Next products: cleaner, faster, and more human.
description: The future vision is to build tools that do more than simply run. They help teams make decisions, track work, and experience software that feels easier to use.
collabTitle: Let's build useful interfaces and reliable systems.
openMoreText: Future only shows selected highlights. Explore the complete archive for product systems, experiments, mobile concepts, UI explorations, and case study notes.

projects.title: TrackOrderFlow
projects.text: A cross-division workflow management system built around Laravel, Inertia React, role permissions, queues, notifications, invoices, finance, and operational dashboards.
projects.longDescription: TrackOrderFlow is imagined as a command center for multi-division operations: sales, relationship managers, production, finance, marketing, project managers, and administrators. The product direction focuses on clarity, permission-aware workflows, realtime notifications, and dashboards that make daily work easier to scan and act on.
projects.role: Fullstack developer, workflow planner, UI systems designer
features: Role-aware workflow dashboards for multiple operational divisions.
Invoice, finance, queue, and notification flow in one integrated system.
Realtime operational visibility using a Laravel and React foundation.
Structured permissions, audit-friendly data, and scalable module boundaries.

projects.title: Lokanata OJS Theme
projects.text: An OJS 3.x theme direction that feels more editorial, easier to customize, and ready for institutional journals with structured publishing workflows.
projects.longDescription: Lokanata OJS Theme is a publishing experience direction for scientific journals that need to feel credible, editorial, and maintainable. The goal is to make OJS customization more elegant while respecting journal workflow standards.
projects.role: OJS theme customizer, CSS system builder, technical support
features: Dedicated OJS 3.x theme direction with custom visual hierarchy.
Custom CSS and Manuscript theme modification for institution needs.
Publishing workflow customization aligned with journal management standards.
Reusable content blocks and support for multi-instance journal setup.

projects.title: Flowty Pay POS
projects.text: A Laravel POS with barcode checkout, stock opname, CRM foundations, and data migration support to help small businesses work faster and more accurately.
projects.longDescription: Flowty Pay POS is a retail operations toolkit built to make checkout, stock tracking, customer data, and migration workflows more practical for small businesses. It focuses on speed, inventory accuracy, and operational simplicity.
projects.role: IT support, Laravel developer, migration handler
features: Barcode checkout flow that reduces average checkout time.
Stock opname workflow for more accurate inventory handling.
CRM integration foundations for SME customer data management.
Migration process for more than 500 SKU records into Majoo.

projects.title: Creative Developer Lab
projects.text: An experimental space for combining React motion, design systems, dashboard analytics, and automation into products that feel more human.
projects.longDescription: Creative Developer Lab is a future-facing playground for turning technical systems into more expressive, useful, and humane products. It combines motion, design systems, analytics, and automation into a living product lab.
projects.role: Creative developer, motion designer, product explorer
features: Motion-first React interface experiments powered by GSAP.
Reusable design system patterns for dashboards and product pages.
Analytics-oriented product concepts with clean information hierarchy.
Automation ideas that reduce repetitive operational work.
